Приложение taskBank

Модели

class taskBank.models.Task(id, subject, order_KIM, type, difficulty, description, image, author, created_at)[source]
class Task(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Модель задания.

Содержит всю информацию о задаче: вопрос, варианты ответов, правильный ответ, сложность и т.д.

Поля: - question: текст вопроса - options: JSON с вариантами ответов - correct_answer: правильный ответ - difficulty: сложность (1-5) - created_at: дата создания - updated_at: дата обновления

exception DoesNotExist
exception MultipleObjectsReturned
exception NotUpdated
exception DoesNotExist
exception MultipleObjectsReturned
exception NotUpdated
class taskBank.models.TaskCorrectAnswer(id, task, answer_text)[source]
exception DoesNotExist

Вьюхи

class taskBank.views.TaskViewSet(**kwargs)[source]
serializer_class

alias of TaskSerializer

Сериализаторы

class taskBank.serializers.TaskCorrectAnswerSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]
class taskBank.serializers.TaskSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]
create(validated_data)[source]

We have a bit of extra checking around this in order to provide descriptive messages when something goes wrong, but this method is essentially just:

return ExampleModel.objects.create(**validated_data)

If there are many to many fields present on the instance then they cannot be set until the model is instantiated, in which case the implementation is like so:

example_relationship = validated_data.pop(‘example_relationship’) instance = ExampleModel.objects.create(**validated_data) instance.example_relationship = example_relationship return instance

The default implementation also does not handle nested relationships. If you want to support writable nested relationships you’ll need to write an explicit .create() method.

URL-маршруты

Админка

class taskBank.admin.TaskCorrectAnswerInline(parent_model, admin_site)[source]
model

alias of TaskCorrectAnswer

class taskBank.admin.TaskAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]
class TaskAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Настройки админки для модели Task.

Отображает список заданий с возможностью фильтрации и поиска.
